title: Closed: Permanent residence for families of victims of flight PS752 - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed: Permanent residence for families of victims of flight PS752
Starting from: $1,210
This pathway allowed certain family members of victims (or their spouse or common-law partner) of Ukraine International Airlines Flight PS752 to apply for permanent residence.
- In-Canada  families of Canadian victims of recent air disasters
- Outside-of-Canada  families of Canadian victims of air disasters
